phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso dal Canal Grande, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh dal kah-NAHL GRahn-deh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Fondamenta Venier dei Leoni, numero sette.
likely_response.pronunciation: fohn-dah-MEHN-tah veh-NEE-ehr DEH-ee leh-OH-nee noo-MEH-roh SEHT-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Fondamenta Venier dei Leoni, number seven.

responses.english: Fondamenta Venier dei Leoni, number seven.
responses.phonetic: fohn-dah-MEHN-tah veh-NEE-ehr DEH-ee leh-OH-nee noo-MEH-roh SEHT-teh
responses.french: Fondamenta Venier dei Leoni, numero sette.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa l'ingresso per gli adulti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah leen-GRES-soh per LYEE ah-DUL-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare fotografie nelle sale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh fo-toh-grah-FEE-eh NEL-leh SAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, il giardino delle sculture è incluso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eel jar-DEE-noh DEL-leh skool-TOO-reh eh in-KLOO-zoh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, included in the entrance ticket.

responses.english: Yes, included in the entrance ticket.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova la collezione di Picasso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah lah kol-let-TSYOH-neh dee pee-KAS-soh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al primo piano, sala numero quattro.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL PREE-moh pee-AH-noh SAH-lah noo-MEH-roh kw-AHTT-roh
likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, room number four.

responses.english: On the first floor, room number four.
responses.phonetic: AHL PREE-moh pee-AH-noh SAH-lah noo-MEH-roh kw-AHTT-roh
responses.french: Al primo piano, sala numero quattro.
